description_long: This is a single slice of cake with a triangular wedge shape, featuring two visible layers of light-colored sponge separated by a thin layer of filling. The top of the cake is coated with a smooth, glossy chocolate ganache, and is adorned with three whole strawberries, one of which has a green stem. The sides of the cake are neatly finished, with the chocolate ganache slightly overhanging the edges. The cake's surface appears soft and moist, while the ganache provides a contrasting sheen. The strawberries add a pop of red color and a fresh, decorative touch to the otherwise simple presentation.
description: A triangular slice of layered cake with chocolate ganache topping and three strawberries as decoration.
description_view_0: The cake slice is seen from a side angle, showing two sponge layers, chocolate ganache on top, and three strawberries.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the triangular shape, glossy ganache, and the arrangement of three strawberries at the wide end.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the same two sponge layers and ganache, with strawberries visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: A rear view shows the thick chocolate ganache edge and the backs of the strawberries, with minimal detail of the cake layers.
